
```{python}
# 3. DROP EXTRA COLUMN
# ---------------------------------
if "." in df.columns:
    df = df.drop(columns=["."])
```

```{python}
# 4. CLEAN DATA
df["Account_No"] = df["Account_No"].astype(str).str.replace("'", "", regex=False).str.strip()

df["TRANSACTION_DETAILS"] = (
    df["TRANSACTION_DETAILS"]
    .astype(str)
    .str.replace("\xa0", " ", regex=False)
    .str.strip()
)

df["DATE"] = pd.to_datetime(df["DATE"], errors="coerce")
df["VALUE_DATE"] = pd.to_datetime(df["VALUE_DATE"], errors="coerce")

for col in ["WITHDRAWAL_AMT", "DEPOSIT_AMT", "BALANCE_AMT"]:
    df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors="coerce").fillna(0)

df = df.dropna(subset=["DATE"]).copy()
df
```

```{python}
# 5. FEATURE ENGINEERING
df["Net_Transaction"] = df["DEPOSIT_AMT"] - df["WITHDRAWAL_AMT"]
df["Transaction_Amount"] = df[["DEPOSIT_AMT", "WITHDRAWAL_AMT"]].max(axis=1)
df["Large_Transaction_Flag"] = np.where(df["Transaction_Amount"] > 500000, "Yes", "No")
df["Negative_Balance_Flag"] = np.where(df["BALANCE_AMT"] < 0, "Yes", "No")
df["Month"] = df["DATE"].dt.to_period("M").astype(str)

df = df.sort_values(["Account_No", "DATE"]).reset_index(drop=True)
df["Cumulative_Balance"] = df.groupby("Account_No")["Net_Transaction"].cumsum()
```

```{python}
# 6. KPI VALUES
total_deposits = df["DEPOSIT_AMT"].sum()
total_withdrawals = df["WITHDRAWAL_AMT"].sum()
average_balance = df["BALANCE_AMT"].mean()
high_value_tx = (df["Large_Transaction_Flag"] == "Yes").sum()
negative_accounts = df.loc[df["BALANCE_AMT"] < 0, "Account_No"].nunique()

print("Total Deposits:", round(total_deposits, 2))
print("Total Withdrawals:", round(total_withdrawals, 2))
print("Average Balance:", round(average_balance, 2))
print("High Value Transactions:", high_value_tx)
print("Accounts with Negative Balances:", negative_accounts)
```
```{python}
# 7. ACCOUNT SUMMARY
# ---------------------------------
account_summary = df.groupby("Account_No", as_index=False).agg({
    "DEPOSIT_AMT": "sum",
    "WITHDRAWAL_AMT": "sum",
    "Transaction_Amount": "mean",
    "BALANCE_AMT": "mean",
    "Large_Transaction_Flag": lambda x: (x == "Yes").sum()
})

account_summary.columns = [
    "Account_No",
    "Total_Deposits",
    "Total_Withdrawals",
    "Avg_Transaction_Amount",
    "Avg_Balance",
    "High_Value_Transactions"
]

account_summary["Risk_Score"] = (
    (account_summary["Total_Withdrawals"] > account_summary["Total_Deposits"]).astype(int)
    + (account_summary["High_Value_Transactions"] > 0).astype(int)
    + (account_summary["Avg_Balance"] < 0).astype(int)
)

account_summary["Risk_Level"] = np.select(
    [
        account_summary["Risk_Score"] >= 3,
        account_summary["Risk_Score"] == 2
    ],
    [
        "High Risk",
        "Medium Risk"
    ],
    default="Low Risk"
)
```

```{python}
# 8. MONTHLY FLOW
# ---------------------------------
monthly_flow = df.groupby("Month", as_index=False).agg({
    "DEPOSIT_AMT": "sum",
    "WITHDRAWAL_AMT": "sum"
})

monthly_melted = monthly_flow.melt(
    id_vars="Month",
    value_vars=["DEPOSIT_AMT", "WITHDRAWAL_AMT"],
    var_name="Flow_Type",
    value_name="Amount"
)
```

```{python}
# 9. TOP 10 TRANSACTIONS
# ---------------------------------
top_10 = df.sort_values("Transaction_Amount", ascending=False).head(10).copy()
top_10["Label"] = top_10["Account_No"] + " | " + top_10["DATE"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
top_10
```


```{python}
# 10. VISUALS
# Top 5 risky accounts
top_accounts = account_summary.sort_values("Risk_Score", ascending=False)["Account_No"].head(5)

filtered_df = df[df["Account_No"].isin(top_accounts)]

fig = px.line(
    filtered_df,
    x="DATE",
    y="BALANCE_AMT",
    color="Account_No",
    title="Balance Trend (Top Risk Accounts)",
    markers=True,
    color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Bold
)

fig.update_layout(template="plotly_white", title_x=0.5)
fig.show()
```

```{python}
fig = px.line(
    df[df["Account_No"].isin(top_accounts)],
    x="DATE",
    y="BALANCE_AMT",
    facet_col="Account_No",
    facet_col_wrap=2,
    title="Balance Trends by Account"
)

fig.update_layout(template="plotly_white", title_x=0.5)
fig.show()
```
```{python}
account_melted = account_summary.melt(
    id_vars="Account_No",
    value_vars=["Total_Deposits", "Total_Withdrawals"],
    var_name="Transaction_Type",
    value_name="Amount"
)

fig_bar = px.bar(
    account_melted,
    x="Account_No",
    y="Amount",
    color="Transaction_Type",
    title="Deposits vs Withdrawals per Account",
    barmode="group",
    color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Set2
)
fig_bar.update_layout(template="plotly_white", title_x=0.5)
fig_bar.show()
```


```{python}
fig_stacked = px.bar(
    monthly_melted,
    x="Month",
    y="Amount",
    color="Flow_Type",
    title="Monthly Inflow vs Outflow",
    barmode="stack",
    color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Pastel
)
fig_stacked.update_layout(template="plotly_white", title_x=0.5)
fig_stacked.show()

```


```{python}
fig_scatter = px.scatter(
    df,
    x="DEPOSIT_AMT",
    y="WITHDRAWAL_AMT",
    color="Large_Transaction_Flag",
    size="Transaction_Amount",
    hover_data=["Account_No", "DATE", "TRANSACTION_DETAILS", "BALANCE_AMT"],
    title="Deposit vs Withdrawal (Outlier Detection)",
    color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe
)
fig_scatter.update_layout(template="plotly_white", title_x=0.5)
fig_scatter.show()

```


```{python}
fig_top10 = px.bar(
    top_10.sort_values("Transaction_Amount"),
    x="Transaction_Amount",
    y="Label",
    orientation="h",
    color="Transaction_Amount",
    title="Top 10 Largest Transactions",
    color_continuous_scale=px.colors.sequential.Viridis
)
fig_top10.update_layout(template="plotly_white", title_x=0.5)
fig_top10.show()

```

```{python}
fig_risk = px.bar(
    account_summary.sort_values("Risk_Score", ascending=False),
    x="Account_No",
    y="Risk_Score",
    color="Risk_Level",
    title="Risk Score by Account",
    color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Set1
)
fig_risk.update_layout(template="plotly_white", title_x=0.5)
fig_risk.show()
```
